headline: How Kyler Murray's exit from Cards impacts Vikings, draft
description: Kyler Murray should become a sought-after QB in free agency, and the Vikings need help. But so do the Cards. Here's what we think.

headline: Stephen A.: Mendoza would be subjected to 'imminent misery' if Jets traded up
description: Stephen A. Smith details the multitude of reasons why he hopes Fernando Mendoza doesn't land with the New York Jets following the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: Miller: 'Jeremiyah Love is the best football player in this class'
description: Matt Miller and Ben Solak discuss what makes Jeremiyah Love the best football player in the 2026 NFL draft class.

headline: 2026 NFL combine superlatives led by Fernando Mendoza, Sonny Styles, Taylen Green
description: Speed and strength headlined the event, but personality powered the biggest impressions.

headline: 2026 NFL mock drafts: Latest ESPN player, team predictions
description: Here are our experts' NFL mock drafts for the 2026 cycle, including projected landing spots for all the top quarterbacks.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Reid's pick predictions in Rounds 1-2
description: Now that the 2026 combine is in the books, how could the NFL draft shake out? Jordan Reid projects the first two rounds -- including two trades.

headline: How the Ohio State Buckeyes can help the Commanders in the draft
description: All four Buckeyes players projected as possible top-10 selections could make sense for Washington.

headline: Sources: Texans acquire RB David Montgomery in trade with Lions
description: The Lions are trading running back David Montgomery to the Texans for offensive lineman Juice Scruggs and two draft picks, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

headline: Orlovsky: Jeremiyah Love is the best player in the draft
description: Dan Orlovsky confidently declares Jeremiyah Love as the best player in the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: Texans trade starting RT Tytus Howard to Browns, source says
description: The Texans have agreed to trade starting right tackle Tytus Howard to the Browns for a fifth-round draft pick, a source told ESPN.

headline: 2026 NFL combine: Mel Kiper's draft standouts, top workouts
description: Mel Kiper Jr. picked out 13 players who caught his attention during combine workouts, including Chris Brazzell II and Dani Dennis-Sutton.
